title: NEO 4.0 HANDOFF_PACKET
_status: INSTALLED 4.0-P3-A (from the KEPT 4.0 Session-0 draft, Addendum A6). Live spine schema. Master-rollover artifact (v4 5.8). A fresh master MUST be able to resume from THIS packet ALONE. A6: last-green carried as REFERENCE + HASH + short summary, never a bulky embed; a stale/partial/ambiguous/hash-mismatched packet MUST be REJECTED (fail-closed).

proof_ref.description: Reference to the last green test proof (root-relative). NOT an embedded copy (A6).

content_hash.description: sha256 the resuming master re-verifies; mismatch => REJECT packet (A6/A7).

summary.description: Short human-readable summary of last green state.

next_decision.description: The single next decision/action the fresh master must take on resume. Mirrors checkpoint.next_step discipline.

packet_self_hash.description: sha256 of packet body (excl. this field). Fresh master recomputes.

all_refs_hashed.description: Every *_ref carries a resolvable content_hash. FALSE => REJECT.

no_open_ambiguity.description: No unresolved high-impact ambiguity. FALSE => REJECT (resume would guess).

no_partial_subsession.description: No sub-session left in_progress without a rollback/accept decision. FALSE => REJECT.

not_stale_assertion.description: Fail-closed stale/partial/ambiguity gate (A6). Any false, any missing hash, or any hash mismatch on resume => the fresh master REJECTS the packet and asks the human; it MUST NOT resume on a partial packet.
